title: Create Your First Agent
lede: Build a Smart Agent from scratch: name it, write its prompt and greeting, pick a model and voice, then test it - all from one editor.

steps.title: Open Smart Agents
steps.content:
1. In the left navigation, go to Intelligence Center → Smart Agents.
  2. You will see the list of your existing agents.
  3. Click Create (the new-agent button) to start a fresh agent.

images.caption: The Smart Agents list - create a new agent from here.
The Smart Agents list - create a new agent from here.

steps.title: Name It and Write the Prompt
steps.content:
1. Give the agent a clear name so you can find it later.
  2. In the prompt column on the left, describe the agent's role, personality, and rules - what it should do and how it should speak.
  3. Set the first message the agent says when a call connects.

images.caption: The editor: prompt on the left, feature panels in the middle.
The editor: prompt on the left, feature panels in the middle.

steps.title: Pick the Brain and Voice
steps.content:
1. Open the Brains (LLM) panel and choose the model that powers replies (a realtime speech-to-speech model, or a text model paired with a transcriber).
  2. Open the Voice (TTS) panel and pick the voice your agent speaks with.

images.caption: Pick the voice (TTS) and brain (LLM) for your agent
Pick the voice (TTS) and brain (LLM) for your agent

steps.title: Add Capabilities (Optional)
steps.content:
• Knowledge Base: upload FAQs and documents to answer from.
  • Tools / MCP: let the agent end calls, book appointments, or call your APIs.
  • Settings: adjust timeouts, idle messages, voicemail, and privacy.

images.caption: Add tools, MCP servers and a knowledge base
Add tools, MCP servers and a knowledge base

steps.title: Test and Save
steps.content:
1. Click Test Agent and connect to talk to it live in the browser.
  2. Refine the prompt, voice, and settings until it behaves the way you want.
  3. Your changes save to the agent so it's ready to attach to a phone number or website.

images.caption: Click Test Agent to try it live before going live
Click Test Agent to try it live before going live

nextSteps.title: What's Next?
nextSteps.description: Now flesh out and launch your new agent:

cards.title: Add Tools
cards.description: Let the agent take actions during a call.

cards.title: Test Your Agent
cards.description: Try it in the browser or over a real phone call.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:
If you run into any issues or have questions:

  • 📧 Email us at support@imash.io
  • 💬 Join our Discord community
  • 📚 Check out our API Reference
  • 🎥 Watch our video tutorials
